title: portulaca howellii
intro: Portulaca howellii, also known as Howell's purslane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It is a succulent plant with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Portulaca howellii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. Herbal preparations of Portulaca howellii can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
